description: Style Note Perfect for those casual outings, these leather sandals from red tape are all you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. Product Details Leather straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style A leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in place Padded ankle strap in leather to lock the foot in place with a velcro closure All straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfort Padded footbed with print Upper stitched to the outsole for durability Textured TPU outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
